title: tricalysia ambrensis subsp. coriacea
intro: Tricalysia ambrensis subsp. coriacea, commonly known as the Coriaceous Tricalysia, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family and is native to Madagascar. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Tricalysia ambrensis subsp. coriacea include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues in traditional medicine.
